title: senecio axillaris
intro: Senecio axillaris, also known as the narrow-leaved fireweed or Jacob's ladder, is a plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural laxative and to treat skin irritations. The health benefits of Senecio axillaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Senecio axillaris can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, although it's essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
